race.comment: BUBBLES AMORE (3) is back from a spell of six-and-a-half months having been a beaten favourite at her only start but she looks to be right up to the mark following a placing in a recent trial. Should enjoy a nice run from this favourable starting position so could make a winning return. MILLYCENT (12) looks close to a win after seconds in her last two starts. Did a fine job to finish 4m away despite breaking last start at Hobart. Draws out a little on the second line so may need luck at some point but with manners she is capable of testing these. KLITSCHKO LEIS (9) has been thereabouts of late and is a chance to break through after placing in the last four outings. WINNING BREW (2) showed pleasing improvement last time out when runner-up at this venue and draws to advantage.
